## Summary

-

## Type of Change

- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Agent enhancement
- [ ] Frontmatter fix
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor

## Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck` passes on any modified shell scripts
- [ ] Agent frontmatter complete (`name`, `description`, `tools`, `model`, `effort`)
- [ ] Agent outputs structured `Status:` block as final response
- [ ] No hardcoded paths (use `$HOME` or `~/`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
